--- # fixture: frontmatter parsing (lines starting with # are ignored by parseFrontmatter) title: Development Test File description: This is a test file for the development of the Liquid parser permalink: /dev layout: default pageClass: dev fmVersion: 1 navOrder: 42 keywords: - test - test2 tags: - alpha - beta --- {{ site.title }} — {{ title }} {% comment %} This is a comment {% endcomment %}

Frontmatter Tests

Page title (FM): {{ title }}

{{ description }}

{{ permalink }}

{{ layout }}

{{ pageClass }}

{{ navOrder }}

{{ fmVersion }}

    {% for kw in keywords %}
  • {{ kw }}
    • {% endfor %}
    {% for t in tags %}
  • {{ t }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% if pageClass == 'dev' %}

pageClass is dev

{% endif %} {% if permalink == '/dev' %}

permalink matches

{% endif %} {% if description contains 'Liquid' %}

description contains Liquid

{% endif %} {% if navOrder == '42' %}

navOrder is string 42 (YAML scalars are strings in this parser)

{% endif %}

Variable Tests

Site name: {{site.name}}

Package version: {{pkg.version}}

Nested path: {{site.footer.text}}

Page title: {{page.title}}

Assign Tests

{% assign greeting = 'Hello from Liquid' %} {% assign number = 100 %} {% assign fromVar = site.author %}

{{greeting}}

Number: {{number}}

From variable: {{fromVar}}

Conditional Tests

{% if site.showHeader %}

Header is enabled

Title: {{site.title}}

{% else %}

No header

{% endif %} {% if user.isAdmin %}

Admin Controls

{% endif %} {% if user.isAdmin %}

Admin Controls

{% elsif user.isEditor %}

Editor Controls

{% else %}

User Controls

{% endif %} {% if user.role == 'admin' %}

User is admin

{% endif %} {% if user.role != 'guest' %}

User is not a guest

{% endif %} {% if user.age > 18 %}

User is an adult

{% endif %} {% if user.age < 65 %}

User is not a senior

{% endif %} {% if number >= 100 %}

Number is at least 100

{% endif %} {% if number <= 200 %}

Number is at most 200

{% endif %} {% if site.description contains 'test' %}

Description contains test

{% endif %} {% if user.isAdmin and user.isLoggedIn %}

Logged in admin

{% endif %} {% if user.isAdmin or user.isEditor %}

Has elevated access

{% endif %} {% assign condA = 1 %} {% assign condB = 1 %} {% assign condC = 2 %} {% if condA == condB and condC == 2 %}

Chained comparison: pass

{% endif %} {% if condA == condB and condC == 99 %}

Chained comparison: fail

{% endif %} {% if site.showHeader or page.featured and user.isEditor %}

Precedence: or before and

{% endif %} {% if user.isEditor and page.featured or site.showHeader %}

Precedence: and before or

{% endif %} {% if user.isLoggedIn %}

Welcome, {{user.name}}

{% if user.isAdmin %} Dashboard {% else %} Profile {% endif %} {% else %} Please login {% endif %}

Unless Tests

{% unless user.isAdmin %}

User is not admin

{% endunless %} {% unless user.isEditor %}

User is not an editor

{% endunless %} {% unless user.isLoggedIn %}

Please log in

{% else %}

Welcome back, admin

{% endunless %} {% unless page.archived %}

No featured badge

{% else %}

This page is archived

{% endunless %} {% unless user.name == 'Admin User' %}

Not the admin user

{% endunless %} {% unless user.name != 'Admin User' %}

Name matches

{% endunless %} {% if user.isLoggedIn %} {% unless user.isEditor %}

Logged in non-editor

{% endunless %} {% endif %}

Case / When Tests

{% case caseDemo.kind %} {% when 'beta' %}

Kind is beta

{% when 'gamma' %}

Kind is gamma

{% else %}

Kind is unknown

{% endcase %} {% case caseDemo.label %} {% when 'alpha', 'omega' %}

Label is alpha or omega

{% else %}

Label did not match

{% endcase %} {% case caseDemo.tier %} {% when 'platinum' %}

Platinum tier

{% else %}

Case fallback: no tier match

{% endcase %} {% assign caseSwitch = 'two' %} {% case caseSwitch %} {% when 'one' %}

Switch is one

{% when 'two' %}

Switch is two

{% endcase %}

Render Tests

{% render 'header', title: 'My Header', navigation: 'Home | About | Contact' %} {% assign cardTitle = 'Dynamic Card' %} {% render 'card', heading: cardTitle, content: 'This card uses variables', tag: 'test' %} {% render 'card', heading: site.title, content: site.description, tag: 'featured' %}
{% render 'button', label: 'Primary Action', type: 'primary' %} {% render 'button', label: 'Secondary', type: 'secondary' %} {% render 'button', label: 'Danger', type: 'danger' %}

Combined Feature Tests

{% assign showCards = site.features.showCards %} {% if showCards %}
{% render 'card', heading: 'Card 1', content: site.card1Text, tag: 'new' %} {% render 'card', heading: 'Card 2', content: site.card2Text, tag: 'popular' %} {% if user.isAdmin %} {% render 'card', heading: 'Admin Card', content: 'Admin only', tag: 'admin' %} {% endif %}
{% else %}

Cards are disabled

{% endif %} {% assign ctaLabel = 'Get Started Now' %} {% render 'button', label: ctaLabel, type: 'primary' %}

  • {{link.label}}

  • {{link.label}}

{% for tag in tags %} {% if tag == 'test' %} {% continue %} {% endif %} {{tag}} {% endfor %}
{% for link in navLinks %} {% endfor %}
indexindex0rindexrindex0firstlastlengthvalue
{{forloop.index}} {{forloop.index0}} {{forloop.rindex}} {{forloop.rindex0}} {{forloop.first}} {{forloop.last}} {{forloop.length}} {{link.label}}

{{link.label}}

{% endfor %}
{% for link in navLinks limit:2 reversed %}

{{link.label}}

{% endfor %}

{% for i in (1..8) offset:3 %} {{i}} {% endfor %}
{% for i in (1..8) reversed limit:3 %} {{i}} {% endfor %}

Increment / Decrement / Echo Tests

{% increment my_counter %} {% increment my_counter %} {% increment my_counter %}
{% decrement my_dec %} {% decrement my_dec %} {% decrement my_dec %}
{% increment a %} {% increment b %} {% increment a %}
{% assign x = 10 %} {% increment x %} {{ x }}
{% increment shared %} {% increment shared %} {% decrement shared %} {% increment shared %}

{% echo site.title %}

{% echo 'literal string' %}

{% echo 99 %}

{% echo colors[0] %}

Cycle Tests

{% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %} {% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %} {% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %} {% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %} {% cycle 'one', 'two', 'three' %}
{% cycle 'row': 'odd', 'even' %} {% cycle 'col': 'a', 'b' %} {% cycle 'row': 'odd', 'even' %} {% cycle 'col': 'a', 'b' %} {% cycle 'row': 'odd', 'even' %}
    {% for color in colors %}
  • {{ color }}
    • {% endfor %}
{% cycle 'x', 'y' %} {% cycle 'a', 'b', 'c' %} {% cycle 'x', 'y' %} {% cycle 'a', 'b', 'c' %}

TableRow Tests

{% tablerow color in colors %} {{ color }} {% endtablerow %}
{% tablerow tag in tags cols:2 %} {{ tag }} {% endtablerow %}
{% tablerow color in colors limit:2 %} {{ color }} {% endtablerow %}
{% tablerow color in colors offset:1 %} {{ color }} {% endtablerow %}
{% tablerow i in (1..5) cols:2 %} {{ i }} {% endtablerow %}
{% tablerow color in colors cols:2 %} {{ tablerowloop.index }}-{{ tablerowloop.col }}-{{ color }} {% endtablerow %}

{{ 7 / 2 }}

big

{{ neg }}

{{ 10 - -3 }}

shown

{% endif %} {% if not user.isAdmin %}

should not appear

{% endif %} {% if not not user.isLoggedIn %}

yes

{% endif %} {% assign flagA = false %} {% assign flagB = true %} {% if not flagA and flagB %}

ok

{% endif %}

{{ article.keywords | join: "," | prepend: "Tags: " }}

{% echo article.title | replace: "Hello", "Hallo" %}

{% assign yr = article.date | date: "year" %} {% if yr == '2026' %}

year matches

{% endif %}
